actions.name: Track event

fields.label: Skip Non-existing Attributes Flag
fields.description: Indicates whether to skip non-existing attributes. If `Yes`, the non-existing attributes are skipped and a 400 error is not returned. If `No`, a 400 error is returned in case of non-existing attributes.

fields.label: Data item to change customer profile audiences
fields.description: An array of JSON objects that contains customer profile identifier and list of audiences to associate and dissociate with the indicated customer profile. Customer profile ID and at least one audience ID are required.

actions.name: Update customer session

fields.description: The customer session integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

customerSessionId.title: Customer Session ID
customerSessionId.description: The customer session integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

fields.label: Callback Destination URI
fields.description: This specifies the address of the service and its endpoint to do callback request.

callbackDestination.title: Callback Destination URI
callbackDestination.description: This specifies the address of the service and its endpoint to do callback request.

fields.label: Callback API Key
fields.description: This specifies API key and relative header. The header is specified optionally

callbackAPIKey.title: Callback API Key
callbackAPIKey.description: This specifies API key and relative header. The header is specified optionally

fields.label: Content Fields
fields.description: This specifies a list of the fields from the response you need to receive. Comma character is separator. If omitted, all the fields will be forwarded from the response to the callback destination.

contentFields.title: Content Fields
contentFields.description: This specifies a list of the fields from the response you need to receive. Comma character is separator. If omitted, all the fields will be forwarded from the response to the callback destination.

fields.label: Correlation ID
fields.description: This specifies ID of the request that will be forwarded to the destination URI with the callback request with the same header name. If omitted, the X-Correlation-ID will not be in the callback request.

callbackCorrelationId.title: Correlation ID
callbackCorrelationId.description: This specifies ID of the request that will be forwarded to the destination URI with the callback request with the same header name. If omitted, the X-Correlation-ID will not be in the callback request.

fields.label: Skip Non-existing Attributes Flag
fields.description: Indicates whether to skip non-existing attributes. If `Yes`, the non-existing attributes are skipped and a 400 error is not returned. If `No`, a 400 error is returned in case of non-existing attributes.

fields.label: Customer Profile ID
fields.description: The customer profile integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

profileId.title: Customer Profile ID
profileId.description: The customer profile integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

fields.label: Coupon Codes
fields.description: Any coupon codes entered. Up to 100 coupons.`

couponCodes.title: Coupon Codes
couponCodes.description: Any coupon codes entered. Up to 100 coupons.`

fields.label: Referral Codes
fields.description: Any referral code entered.`

fields.label: Loyalty Cards
fields.description: Any loyalty cards used. Up to 1 loyalty cards.`

loyaltyCards.title: Loyalty Cards
loyaltyCards.description: Any loyalty cards used. Up to 1 loyalty cards.`

fields.label: State
fields.description: Indicates the current state of the session. `

state.title: State
state.description: Indicates the current state of the session. `

fields.label: Card Items
fields.description:
The items to add to this sessions.

If cart item flattening is disabled: Do not exceed 1000 items (regardless of their quantity) per request.
If cart item flattening is enabled: Do not exceed 1000 items and ensure the sum of all cart item's quantity does not exceed 10.000 per request.`

cartItems.title: Card Items
cartItems.description:
The items to add to this sessions.

If cart item flattening is disabled: Do not exceed 1000 items (regardless of their quantity) per request.
If cart item flattening is enabled: Do not exceed 1000 items and ensure the sum of all cart item's quantity does not exceed 10.000 per request.`

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: Quantity of item. Important: If you enabled cart item flattening, the quantity is always one and the same cart item might receive multiple per-item discounts. Ensure you can process multiple discounts on one cart item correctly.

returnedQuantity.title: Returned quantity
returnedQuantity.description: Number of returned items, calculated internally based on returns of this item.

remainingQuantity.title: Remaining quantity
remainingQuantity.description: Remaining quantity of the item, calculated internally based on returns of this item.

category.title: Category
category.description: Type, group or model of the item.

position.title: Position
position.description: Position of the Cart Item in the Cart (calculated internally).

attributes.title: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description:
Use this property to set a value for the attributes of your choice. Attributes represent any information to attach to this cart item.

Custom cart item attributes must be created in the Campaign Manager before you set them with this property.

[See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).

additionalCosts.title: Additional Costs
additionalCosts.description: Use this property to set a value for the additional costs of this session, such as a shipping cost.`

fields.label: Additional Costs
fields.description: Use this property to set a value for the additional costs of this session, such as a shipping cost.`

additionalCosts.title: Additional Costs
additionalCosts.description: Use this property to set a value for the additional costs of this session, such as a shipping cost.`

fields.label: Identifiers
fields.description: Session custom identifier that you can set limits on or use inside your rules. For example, you can use IP addresses as identifiers to potentially identify devices and limit discounts abuse in case of customers creating multiple accounts.

identifiers.title: Identifiers
identifiers.description: Session custom identifier that you can set limits on or use inside your rules. For example, you can use IP addresses as identifiers to potentially identify devices and limit discounts abuse in case of customers creating multiple accounts.

fields.label: Attribute-Value pairs
fields.description: Use this property to set a value for the attributes of your choice. Attributes represent any information to attach to your session, like the shipping city. [See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).

attributes.title: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description: Use this property to set a value for the attributes of your choice. Attributes represent any information to attach to your session, like the shipping city. [See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).
